rows.label: qev300271_MSG0001
rows.name:
Friend is brave BLADE who
accepted that insane request?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev300271_MSG0002
rows.name:
It no easy feat to gather 12,000 units
of miranium! Efforts of friend enough
to bring this Nopon to tears.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev300271_SEL0021
rows.name: Hold on to your miranium for now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev300271_MSG0004
rows.name:
Many thanks. Nopon still new at this
miranium stuff, but give us 500 years or
so and friend can expect big dividends![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev300271_MSG0005
rows.name:
Mo-mo! Friend should put
more faith in Nopon![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev300271_MSG0006
rows.name:
Huh? Friend not have 12,000
units? Give back tears![ST:wait ]
